200.description: List of active special offers for the property

items.description: A special offer / promotional price for a property

price.description: Special offer price in GBP for the specified date range

checkout.description: Check-out date for this special offer (YYYY-MM-DD)

description.example: Early summer special — save over 15% on a week in Porlock

created.description: When the special offer was created

modified.description: When the special offer was last modified

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text
